test_cases.evidence: response-poller.ts (877 lines) re-exports from response-extractor, response-cleaner, tui-accumulator and retains polling control functions (startPolling, stopPolling, stopAllPolling, getActivePollers).

test_cases.scenario: シナリオ8: 新規作成ファイルが適切な責務を持つこと
